missions.title: Redox Reactions and Electrochemistry - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering oxidation/reduction, oxidation number rules, redox balancing and more.

microtargets.title: Oxidation/reduction
ncertAnchors: NCERT Chemistry Class mixed, Oxidation/reduction
mustKnowFacts: Oxidation/reduction is a fundamental subtopic of Redox Reactions and Electrochemistry.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Oxidation/reduction for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Oxidation/reduction during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Oxidation/reduction.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Oxidation/reduction.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Oxidation/reduction.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Oxidation/reduction.
What is a common trap associated with Oxidation/reduction?
